Actions.Text: REFERRED TO CRIME VICTIMS, CRIME AND CORRECTION
COMMITTEE DISCHARGED AND COMMITTED TO RULES

Title: Extends certain provisions relating to the boarding of out of state incarcerated individuals
Summary: Extends certain provisions relating to the boarding of out of state incarcerated individuals until September 1, 2029.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend chapter 573 of the laws of 2011, amending the correction law relating to the boarding of out of state inmates at local correctional facilities, in relation to extending the expiration of the provisions thereof
